EXPLANATION: The paper was found on the official program page for the 17th International OPT Workshop on Optimization for Machine Learning (OPT 2025), which was held in conjunction with NeurIPS 2025. The authors, title, and venue details provided in the citation are correct.

LINK: https://neurips.cc/virtual/2025/workshop/93489
FOUND_TITLE: FineAMP: Optimization-Based Automatic Mixed Precision Quantization for Efficient Diffusion Model Inference
FOUND_AUTHORS: Burak Bartan, Ruizhong Qiu, Rafael Esteves, Yuwei Ren, Weiliang Zeng, An Chen
FOUND_YEAR: 2025
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
